# Asset File Types

**API Collection**

Uniform Type Identifiers for file formats supported by the Model I/O framework.

## Constants

- **kUTTypeAlembic**: The Alembic file format (common extension `.abc`).
- **kUTType3dObject**: The Object file format (common extension `.obj`).
- **kUTTypePolygon**: The Polygon file format (common extension `.ply`).
- **kUTTypeStereolithography**: The Stereolithography file format (common extension `.stl`), also known as the Standard Tessellated Geometry format.
- **kUTTypeUniversalSceneDescription**: The Universal Scene Description file format (common extension `.usd`).
